title: RetrievalRequest
description: Standard request payload sent by the backend to any retrieval module. All three modules (vector, keyword, CLaRa) accept this exact input shape, routed from backend/app/api/query.py.

query.example: What are the main risks of RAG hallucination?

top_k.description: Number of top chunks to retrieve.

method.description: Retrieval method to use. Determines which adapter is called in backend/app/retrieval/.

filters.description: Optional filtering constraints applied before retrieval.

document_ids.description: Restrict retrieval to these document IDs only. Empty list means no filter (search all).

file_types.description: Restrict retrieval to documents of these file types.

use_reranking.description: Whether to apply a reranking pass after initial retrieval. Relevant for CLaRa.

example.query: What are the main risks of RAG hallucination?
